overall.description: A first-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and an indoor vending machine area. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's detailed urban environment with wet reflective pavement and dense commercial signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: passing by a body lying on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated pedestrian walkway, passing a body on the ground and approaching a vending machine

entered.detail: green and orange vending machine with 'BURRITO XXL' and 'IT'S BIG' signage
human figure lying face-down on the wet tiled pavement
tall vertical digital billboard with pink and red neon imagery
bright linear light fixture spanning across the walkway
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet, neon-lit elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city. A body lies on the ground ahead as the camera walks forward past a Burrito XXL vending machine on the right. Tall skyscrapers with glowing advertisements rise on both sides, and glass railings line the walkway edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon of skyscrapers with vertical neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above
camera tilts back down to walking level

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to gaze at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs overhead, then returning to walking posture

entered.detail: tall building facade with grid-like window patterns and yellow accent lighting
bright cyan neon sign with musical note design

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the imposing height of the surrounding skyscrapers, showcasing the vertical density of the city. Neon signs and illuminated windows cover the building facades against the night sky. After several seconds, the view returns to street level and continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian walkway lined with advertisements

events.description: passing large holographic medical advertisement and fight posters
approaching the entrance to an indoor vending machine area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the neon-lit walkway, passing various billboards and approaching a vending machine kiosk

entered.detail: large blue digital billboard displaying 'AESCULAPIUS' medical branding
vertical billboard showing combat sports imagery with red and white colors
small structure housing multiple vending machines with bright signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the walkway, the camera passes by a large blue medical billboard and various neon advertisements. The environment remains consistently urban and commercial, with wet pavement reflecting the colorful lights. The segment ends as the camera approaches the entrance to a small indoor vending area.

scene_state.functional_zone: small break room with vending machines and seating

events.description: entering the indoor vending machine room from the outdoor walkway
looking around the room at the vending machines and furniture
exiting the indoor room back to the outdoor walkway

agents.ego_description: entering the small indoor break room, examining the vending machines and red plastic chairs, then exiting back to the street

entered.detail: three 'Insta-Food' vending machines displaying 'BURRITO XXL' with bright screens
several red plastic chairs arranged around a white table
large poster on the wall advertising a fight event with 'FIGHT' text
white plastic table with bottles and items on top

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a small indoor break room featuring multiple Burrito XXL vending machines, red plastic chairs, and a white table. The lighting shifts to warm artificial indoor lighting. After briefly examining the room and the fight posters on the walls, the camera exits back to the neon-lit outdoor walkway, completing the circuit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a neon-drenched pedestrian walkway that briefly diverts into a sterile indoor break room before returning to the urban night. It begins by moving past a body on the wet pavement and a Burrito XXL vending machine, flanked by towering skyscrapers and glass railings. As the camera tilts upward to capture the imposing verticality of the glowing city facades, the view then returns to street level to glide past a large blue medical billboard and various reflective commercial signs. The scene shifts from the open air into a small indoor area characterized by warm artificial lighting, red plastic chairs, and fight posters on the walls. Finally, the camera exits the room and emerges back onto the vibrant, neon-lit walkway to complete the circuit.
